prompt: /explain-codebase how does logrus add hooks to log entries? (no --scope passed)

assertions.text: Produces a markdown file at .onboard/<slug>-<ISO>.md (explainer.md present in outputs)
Frontmatter contains question, scope, generated_at, visited_files, depth_reached, budget_state fields
Contains all 6 locked sections in order: Overview, Entry point, Sequence, Files touched, Gotchas, Open questions
Has at least 3 file:line citations across the explainer body
INDEX.md created or updated with a row matching the explainer file
_session_state.json present with visited list and notes log
Inferred scope is feature/auth-related (e.g. feature:hooks) — not a file path
